steps.title: Track the nesting sequence
steps.content: The passage gives a clear order: first the turtle digs a nest, then she lays eggs, and finally she covers the nest with sand. The blank needs a transition for the middle action in that sequence.

steps.title: Reject contrast and examples
steps.content: A would make egg laying contrast with nest digging, which it does not. B would call the two actions similar rather than sequential. D would make egg laying an example of digging the nest, which is illogical. The answer is C.
